sqlMap.select: select * from ContractorEnvLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ContractorEnvLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ContractorName ContServicesPerformed PercentOfEnvGBillings IsEvidenceRequired LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ContractorName# #ContServicesPerformed# #PercentOfEnvGBillings# #IsEvidenceRequired# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('ContractorEnvLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ContractorEnvKey, ContractorName, ContServicesPerformed, PercentOfEnvGBillings, IsEvidenceRequired, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ContractorEnvLW where ContractorEnvKey = #ContractorEnvKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ContractorEnvLW set
ContractorName = #ContractorName# ContractorName = null ContServicesPerformed = #ContServicesPerformed# ContServicesPerformed = null PercentOfEnvGBillings = #PercentOfEnvGBillings# PercentOfEnvGBillings = null IsEvidenceRequired = #IsEvidenceRequired# IsEvidenceRequired = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where ContractorEnvKey = #ContractorEnvKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ContractorEnvLW where ContractorEnvKey = #ContractorEnvKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ContractorEnvLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ContractorEnvKey, ContractorName, ContServicesPerformed, PercentOfEnvGBillings, IsEvidenceRequired, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ContractorEnvLW where ContractorEnvKey = #ContractorEnvKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ContractorEnvKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ContractorName, ContServicesPerformed, PercentOfEnvGBillings, IsEvidenceRequired, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from ContractorEnvLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
